non_blocking: Runtime payload contract for the new non-tool hooks is asserted from Hermes source/docs but not end-to-end exercised in this repo; reviewer recommended a real Hermes run as future confidence.
explicitly_says_no_issue_to_log is coarse and can exempt a mixed response that also contains a real finding; acceptable for the explicit-escape approximation.
_state_key reads _latest_turn_by_session outside _state_lock; benign under expected sequential hook invocation, possible future concurrency hardening.
summary: Approved. Implementation realizes the scoped Hermes-native Stop-hook approximation, preserves env blocker behavior, registers/docs/tests the new hooks, and verification passed.
